title: Emma Goldman
content:
How should they appraise you,
    who walk up close to you
    as to a mountain,
    each proclaiming his own eyeful
    against the other's eyeful.

    Only time
    standing well off
    shall measure your circumference and height.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Lola Ridge, titled "Emma Goldman", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
